author: moszinet
description: Sync emails sent to your mail2note address into your vault as Markdown notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Szilveszter Molnar
manifest.description: Sync emails sent to your mail2note address into your vault as Markdown notes.
manifest.name: mail-to-note

name: mail-to-note

releases.author: moszinet
releases.description:
Align display name (`manifest.json` `name`) and README H1 with the new plugin id `mail-to-note`. Also align npm `package.json` `name` for repo-scan consistency.

No functional or behavioral changes.

releases.author: moszinet
releases.description:
Rename plugin id to `mail-to-note` for compliance with the new Obsidian Community portal rules (lowercase ASCII letters and hyphens only — no digits). Display name is now `Mail2note`, matching the casing already used in user-facing strings since v0.1.1.

No functional or behavioral changes.

releases.author: moszinet
releases.description:
## Changes

- Drop `async` from functions that don't `await` anything (`resolveUniquePath` and test-mock stubs) — addresses `@typescript-eslint/require-await` from the Obsidian review bot.
- Capitalize "Mail2note" in user-facing notices, status bar, and command UI to comply with the sentence-case rule.
- Remove the literal `m2n_...` and `mail2note` placeholders from settings inputs; descriptions already explain the format.
- Stop overriding the `obsidianmd/ui/sentence-case` rule locally — the override was masking real lint failures from the catalog reviewer.
- Drop "Obsidian" from the README opening tagline.

No behavior change. Lint, type-check, and tests all green.
